zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustace Sandeby於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭肯特古德內斯同時，她的父親Bartram Sandeby16歲，母親Unknown24歲。她於大約1355年與John de Bois I在英國英格蘭戴文哈爾波頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1386年享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sandeby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Sandy (Bedfordshire), from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ēg ‘island’, ‘dry land in a fen or marsh’.
English: ultimately from the Old Norse personal name Sand(i), a short form of the various compound names with the first element sandr ‘sand’, such as Sandúlfr (see Sandall ).
Scottish: from an abbreviated and suffixed pet form of   Alexander  ; compare   Sandison  .

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustace Sandeby was born about 1330, in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bartram Sandeby, was 16 and her mother, Unknown, was 24. She married John de Bois I about 1355, in Halberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1386, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustace Sandeby est née environ 1330, à Goodnestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartram Sandeby, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John de Bois I environ 1355, à Halberton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1386, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustace Sandeby um 1330 in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartram Sandeby 16 und ihre Mutter Unknown 24. Sie hat um 1355 in Halberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom John de Bois I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1386 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace Sandeby è nata il circa 1330 nel Goodnestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Bartram Sandeby, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Unknown, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John de Bois I circa 1355, nel Halberton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1386, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustace Sandebyが約1330年にイギリスイギリスケントグドネストーンで生まれた時，父Bartram Sandebyは16歳，母Unknownは24歳であった。約1355年にイギリスイギリスデボンハルバートンでJohn de Bois Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1386年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustace Sandeby(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 구드네스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartram Sandeby(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 할버턴에서 John de Bois I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1386년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace Sandeby nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bartram Sandeby, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Unknown, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Bois I aproximadamente 1355, em Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1386, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustace Sandeby родилась около 1330 г. в местности гуднестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartram Sandeby было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Bois I около 1355 г. в местности хэлбиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1386 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
